hero_subtitle: SFTY links alerts, provider checks, and regulatory triggers into a single case dashboard that tracks ownership, status, evidence, and decision logs with audit-ready clarity.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance workflows slow with manual case tracking
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to maintain clear ownership and status visibility when case data and evidence remain dispersed across multiple tools. This fragmentation creates delays in review cycles and weakens audit readiness for regulated digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates provider outputs, review status, evidence and decision logs into one unified dashboard so compliance teams can track case ownership, progress and audit trails efficiently.
workflow_title: From alerts to case evidence and decisions
workflow_description: SFTY structures alerts from multiple providers into review queues, opens cases, records decisions, preserves evidence, and prepares reports within one compliance dashboard.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, decisions, cases and evidence to give compliance teams clear control and audit-ready case management.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP operations teams with a controlled layer for case tracking, audit-ready evidence preservation and scalable deployment within regulated compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help track compliance cases and evidence
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case management dashboards support alert triage
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved in case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs connect to case ownership tracking
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects provider outputs into structured reviews, regulatory rules, cases, evidence and reports for digital asset compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage case workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes alerts through configurable workflows, creates cases, assigns ownership, records decisions, and preserves evidence within one dashboard for efficient compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to maintain an audit-ready compliance record suitable for internal reviews and external regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into connected workflows without disrupting existing compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but structures their outputs into coordinated workflows, decisions, regulatory updates and audit evidence.
final_title: Connect case management to audit-ready evidence
final_description: Review how SFTY centralizes alerts, provider outputs and decisions in one dashboard for clear case ownership and tracking.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
